summaries.title: Save Points Tab — From Mock Facade to Real Data
summaries.summary: Mock data facades are dangerous because they make features appear complete while write operations fail silently. The fix required creating missing backend endpoints, fixing async/await bugs, replacing nonexistent methods, and adding WebSocket integration for real-time updates. Key lesson: always test create/update/delete actions against real endpoints, verify backend methods exist, and wire both WebSocket and polling for data consistency.
